problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
